title: Customer Discovery – Workflow Pain Points
context: Product research for a B2B SaaS startup exploring whether to build a workflow automation tool. Interviewing potential users to understand real pain points before committing to a product direction.

pillars.question: Walk me through how you currently handle your end-to-end workflow from start to finish.
Where does the process break most often, and what do you do when it breaks?
How do you decide between different approaches or tools when something needs to change?
